name: Facade
description: An apartment block after dark — most windows asleep, a few burning amber or telly-blue, the mix rewired by every redraw.

code.style: --win: @p(var(--color2), var(--color2), var(--color2), var(--color1), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --lit: @rand(0.5, 1); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 22%; top: 16%; width: 56%; height: 64%; border-radius: 6%; background: var(--win); opacity: var(--lit); transition: ease 800ms; } } @random(0.24) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 22%; top: 16%; width: @rand(20%, 32%); height: 64%; background: rgba(10, 12, 22, 0.55); transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
